content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.upgrade_extractor
FILE: cosmos/core/upgrade_extractor.py (340 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Upgrade Extractor - NLP analysis of swarm conversations to identify upgrade suggestions.

This module analyzes chat history to automatically detect when the swarm or users
suggest improvements, new features, or upgrades. These are then prioritized and
fed into the evolution loop as tasks.

Patterns 

CLASSES:
- UpgradeExtractor: Extracts and prioritizes upgrade suggestions from chat history.
  Methods: def extract_from_message(self, message: str, speaker: str=None) -> list[dict]
  Methods: def extract_from_history(self, chat_history: list[dict], limit: int=100) -> list[dict]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def extract_upgrades(chat_history: list[dict], limit: int=50) -> list[str]
- async def prioritize_upgrades(upgrades: list[str]) -> list[dict]
- def integrate_with_evolution_loop(evolution_loop, swarm_manager)
- def get_extractor() -> UpgradeExtractor
